Andreas Paul

• 3rd

Founding Director of Proper Recruitment. Managing All Permanent & Temporary Recruitment Activity across the Construction, Legal & Property Industries.

Job poster

Message

About the job

🚨NEW OPPORTUNITY‼️


Role: Software Engineer / Full Stack Developer

Location: Essex

This is an office based role Monday - Friday | 9am - 6pm


Proper Recruitment are working with an established estate agent who are looking for a skilled and ambitious Software Engineer / Full Stack Developer to join their growing team. This is an exciting opportunity to work on a variety of web and mobile applications, internal systems and client-facing platforms, playing a key role in driving innovation across the business.


Responsibilities:

  • Building and maintaining full-stack web and mobile applications
  • Developing back-end systems using Node.js and Express
  • Creating responsive front-end interfaces with React
  • Designing and maintaining SQL databases and API integrations
  • Building secure, scalable internal systems, client portals and automation tools
  • Improving existing applications and supporting deployment processes
  • Collaborating with leadership to deliver practical software solutions


Requirements:

  • Strong experience with JavaScript, Node.js, Express and React
  • Excellent SQL and relational database knowledge
  • Experience building full-stack applications from concept to deployment
  • Experience working with REST APIs, webhooks and third-party integrations
  • Knowledge of Git, secure coding practices and application security
  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills


Desirable:

  • Experience with SaaS products
  • PHP experience
  • AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Vercel or Netlify
  • CI/CD pipelines
  • Mobile application development
  • CRM, automation or telephony platform integrations
  • Webex or similar communication platforms


Salary:

  • £40,000 – £80,000 per annum (DOE)


Tenure:

  • Full-Time | Monday – Friday


If you're an experienced Full Stack Developer looking to work on exciting technology projects within a fast-growing business, we'd love to hear from you. Please submit your CV and apply.


Any enquiries can also be directed to candidate@example.com or by phone – 0208 057 4047.
